name: TransformerEngine
desc: A library for accelerating Transformer models on NVIDIA GPUs, including using 8-bit and 4-bit floating point (FP8 and FP4) precision on Hopper, Ada and Blackwe…
descFull: A library for accelerating Transformer models on NVIDIA GPUs, including using 8-bit and 4-bit floating point (FP8 and FP4) precision on Hopper, Ada and Blackwell GPUs, to provide better performance with lower memory utilization in both training and inference.
